rationale: Massive mismatch on every axis: a screaming Super Saiyan Goku hook with hot yellow/red/black palette directly opposes Marble Sort's calm, pastel, character-free, "relaxing brain-training" positioning aimed at women 25-55. The aggressive shonen-anime audience skews young/male and the "Dragon Fist" action hook has no narrative bridge to color-sorting or conveyor physics gameplay. Skip this archetype — also note IP risk (Dragon Ball is licensed) makes it a non-starter even if we wanted to test a high-energy variant.
